channel.title: noxCTF on bellabeen
channel.description: Recent content in noxCTF on bellabeen

item.title: [writeups] noxCTF 2018
item.description: Tepat tadi malam telah berakhir nya competition noxCTF di https://ctf18.noxale.com/ daftar kemarin siang jam 1 an cuman ngerjain 2 soal heheheMendingan kita langsung liat bagaimana sih writeup nya Soal bisa diakses disini https://ctf18.noxale.com/challenges Chop Suey Today I ate in a Chinese restaurant and got myself a fortune cookie. These things usually contain a note with a nice sentence or phrase, but mine had numbers in it instead! Can you help me find the meaning of the numbers?
